items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: obsidian plugin that merges notes into one
items.title: niffka/notes-merger: obsidian plugin that merges notes into one

items.content_html: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars
items.title: sytone/obsidian-queryallthethings: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars

items.content_html: This Obsidian plugin puts all renamed note files into title case as defined by the MLA.
items.title: ChaseTramel/obsidian-title-case-note-title: This Obsidian plugin puts all renamed note files into title case as defined by the MLA.

items.content_html: A small plugin for obsidian to keep your mileage log
items.title: bgfxc4/obsidian-mileage-log: A small plugin for obsidian to keep your mileage log

items.content_html: The missing Obsidian plugin to mark note as favorite.
items.title: mahmudz/obsidian-favorite-plugin: The missing Obsidian plugin to mark note as favorite.

items.content_html: This Obsidian Plugin allows users to have a different file explorer experience.
items.title: ozntel/file-tree-alternative: This Obsidian Plugin allows users to have a different file explorer experience.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.

items.content_html: A plugin for publishing Obsidian documents to Blogger.
items.title: privet-kitty/obsidian-blogger: A plugin for publishing Obsidian documents to Blogger.

items.content_html: 📺 A plugin that would help you to fetch YouTube videos data into your vault.
items.title: sundevista/youtube-template: 📺 A plugin that would help you to fetch YouTube videos data into your vault.

items.content_html: Notion-like navigation plugin for Obsidian.
items.title: senselogic/ATLAS: Notion-like navigation plugin for Obsidian.

items.content_html: 🪁 An Obsidian plugin for multi-cursor support
items.title: benmatselby/obsidian-multi-cursor: 🪁 An Obsidian plugin for multi-cursor support

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for Oil/Vinegar Like Navigation within an Obsidian Vault.
items.title: conneroisu/sugar-rush: Obsidian Plugin for Oil/Vinegar Like Navigation within an Obsidian Vault.

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin for annotating PDF files with highlights just by linking to text selection. It also adds many quality-of-life improvements to Obsidian's built-in PDF viewer and PDF embeds.
items.title: RyotaUshio/obsidian-pdf-plus: An Obsidian.md plugin for annotating PDF files with highlights just by linking to text selection. It also adds many quality-of-life improvements to Obsidian's built-in PDF viewer and PDF embeds.

items.content_html: Grabs data from IVRE and brings it into Obsidian notes
items.title: ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin: Grabs data from IVRE and brings it into Obsidian notes

items.content_html: A plugin that turns an Obsidian vault into a simple music data base.
items.title: chnmk/obsidian-mdb-plugin: A plugin that turns an Obsidian vault into a simple music data base.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin: Highlight, dim & style your files & folders in the file explorer (navigation) based on predefined or custom rules.
items.title: iOSonntag/obsidian-plugin-treefocus: Obsidian plugin: Highlight, dim & style your files & folders in the file explorer (navigation) based on predefined or custom rules.

items.content_html: Obsidian Wechat public Plugin (微信公众平台) is a plugin to release article from your Obsidian Vault.
items.title: ai-chen2050/obsidian-wechat-public-platform: Obsidian Wechat public Plugin (微信公众平台) is a plugin to release article from your Obsidian Vault.

items.title: jrtx0/jrtx-obsidian-blogs: my blog based on obsidian digitalgarden plugin.

items.content_html: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!
items.title: ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!
